LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT ABBETT ELECTRIC CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S DISMISSAL OF THE MOVING DEFENDANT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JEFFREY ABBETT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE REMAINS A FACTUAL ISSUE WHETHER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PAYMENT FOR WORK PERFORMED IS BASED ON AN INSTRUMENT IN WRITING. THEREFORE, THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION HAS RUN. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE EXISTENCE OF AN OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT OR AN ACCOUNT STATED. THE COURT DOES NOT REACH THE ISSUE WHETHER DEFENDANT BIZZARI IS SUBJECT TO LIABILITY AS A SPOUSE BECAUSE SHE DID NOT RAISE THAT ISSUE IN HER MOVING PAPERS. MR. BRODERICK IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

APPEARANCES - ATTY. TIMOTHY B. BRODERICK, TEL. NO. (650) 857-9000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JANET BRAYER, TEL. NO. 445-9555 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY JEFFREY ABBETT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JEFFREY ABBETT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE REMAINS A FACTUAL ISSUE WHETHER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PAYMENT FOR WORK PERFORMED IS BASED ON AN INSTRUMENT IN WRITING. THEREFORE, THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION HAS RUN. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE EXISTENCE OF AN OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT OR AN ACCOUNT STATED. THE COURT DOES NOT REACH THE ISSUE WHETHER DEFENDANT BIZZARI IS SUBJECT TO LIABILITY AS A SPOUSE BECAUSE SHE DID NOT RAISE THAT ISSUE IN HER MOVING PAPERS. Mr. Broderick is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
